arts.ttl: Bournemouth and Wolves endure seven-minute FA Cup delay in latest VAR farce

arts.sum: Fulham striker Rodrigo Muniz has heaped praise on teammate Andreas Pereira, admitting he is like his big brother at Craven Cottage. Muniz has been speaking to GE Globo about life at Fulham and his relationship with various Brazilian players in the Premier League. arts.ttl: Bournemouth v Wolves: FA Cup latest, plus EFL, Bundesliga, La Liga and more – live
arts.sum: Updates from Saturday’s afternoon kick-offs Live scoreboard | Email Will | Sign up for Football Daily There’s been another goal at Selhurst Park. Palace are now 3-1 up, Eddie Nketiah getting his fourth goal of the season. It’s official: Preston are through to the FA Cup quarters for the first time in 59 years. There’s bound to be considerable fallout from the match but, on the field, there’s little doubt the hosts were the dominant team. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: “It is fantastic” – Signing from Bournemouth sees new club as ‘most important goal’ of career
arts.sum: Napoli signed Philip Billing from Bournemouth in the winter transfer window. The Dane arrived on an initial loan deal with the option to buy. So far, his time in Naples has not quite taken off but it should soon become better. arts.ttl: How to watch Bournemouth vs Wolves
arts.sum: Bournemouth vs Wolves kicks off at 3pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 2.30pm. Live text coverage of Bournemouth vs Wolves is also being provided on Saturday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Wolves XI vs Bournemouth – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Wolves face Bournemouth for the second time in a week when the sides meet in the FA Cup’s fifth round today. Vitor Pereira’s side secured an important 1-0 in on the south coast in the Premier League a week ago and now return to the Vitality Stadium. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man Utd Could Sign Matheus Cunha to 'Complement' Victor Osimhen

arts.ttl: Bournemouth injury news: Andoni Iraola provides Ryan Christie fitness update ahead of Wolves FA Cup
arts.sum: Bournemouth head coach Andoni Iraola provides an update on Ryan Christie's injury status ahead of Saturday's FA Cup clash with Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Boost for Bournemouth as player ‘released to return’ – Aiming for comebask as soon as possible
arts.sum: Bournemouth have been handed an injury boost as defender Julian Araujo has been granted permission to return to training. That’s according to the Mexican edition of AS, who report that the defender is ‘aiming for a comeback’ after several months out of action.
